title: Sahara AI Connect Party 2025
summary: The opening-night party of Korea Blockchain Week 2025 for Sahara AI — a 1,000-guest global networking event on Seoul's Sebit Island, produced end to end by PROOF.

sections.p: Sahara AI — a platform merging blockchain and AI — wanted to open Korea Blockchain Week with the side event everyone talks about: a must-attend night for VIPs, industry leaders and global partners, blending technology, culture and music.

PROOF produced the evening end to end on Seoul's Sebit Island — venue, production, AV, staging and the pacing that kept 1,000 guests in the room and talking. The goal was the single most-talked-about side event of the week, and the night delivered it.

quote.text: Three global partners told us it was the best event of the week. That doesn't happen by luck.

title: Seoul Meta Week 2025
summary: Asia's largest AI & Web3 B2B tech event — PROOF's own flagship summit at COEX, themed 'Work. System. Intelligence.' 21 sessions, 26 global speakers, 1,500+ attendees.

sections.p: Seoul Meta Week is our own flagship — and 2025 moved past technology-for-its-own-sake to the AI strategy and real cases that change how organizations work, under the theme 'Work. System. Intelligence.'

Across two days at COEX Auditorium, PROOF produced the full event — 21 sessions, 26 global speakers, the MetaCon 2025 main conference, exhibitions and networking — so 1,500+ attendees could experience AI, Web3, AI agents and blockchain first-hand.

quote.text: Institutional muscle that turns a blockchain conference into something people actually fly in for.

title: TOKEN2049 Singapore — Sahara AI
summary: Booth and side event for platinum sponsor Sahara AI at TOKEN2049 Singapore — venue, vendors and on-site execution in a city the client didn't operate in. (A sponsor activation — not the conference itself.)

sections.p: TOKEN2049 is the world's largest crypto event — 20,000+ attendees, 500+ side events at Marina Bay Sands. Platinum sponsor Sahara AI needed its booth and side event run flawlessly, in a city where they had no operating footprint.

PROOF built and ran Sahara AI's sponsor booth and side event — the part we handle, not the conference itself. The make-or-break was overseas execution: sourcing and managing reliable local vendors and communication, which is exactly the experience we bring to international events.

quote.text: We briefed them on Monday and had a confirmed venue by Wednesday. For us, that certainty was everything.

title: Polygon Aggregation Summit 2024
summary: Polygon Labs' first Aggregation Summit, Bangkok — PROOF ran Polygon's biggest 2024 event as their APAC event agency, from planning to on-site, across 50+ programs.

sections.p: Polygon Labs chose PROOF as its APAC offline event agency to deliver its single biggest event of 2024 — the first Polygon Aggregation Summit, in Bangkok — from the planning stage through on-site operations.

Across two days, PROOF ran 50+ concurrent programs: seminars, panels, pitch sessions and partner booths, alongside a DJ party, chess tournament, running club, yoga and massage. Tight planning and execution kept many simultaneous tracks and a complex floor running smoothly, faithfully reflecting the client's vision.

title: Seoul Meta Week 2024
summary: Asia's representative Digital Tech Talks — our flagship summit at COEX, themed 'Ride the Waves of Technology.' 22 sessions, 50 global speakers, 1,500+ attendees.

sections.p: Seoul Meta Week 2024 focused on the latest in AI, Web3, metaverse and AR/VR under the theme 'Ride the Waves of Technology' — Asia's representative Digital Tech Talks.

Over two days at COEX Auditorium, PROOF delivered 22 sessions and 50 global speakers with industry talks, leader networking, panels, exhibition booths and on-site events — a high-satisfaction program for 1,500+ attendees.

title: Polygon Connect Korea
summary: Polygon's Korea market-entry event, co-hosted with Hashed — sessions, business networking and a hip after-party for ~500 on-site guests.

sections.p: Polygon — among the most promising Ethereum scaling solutions — and Korea's blockchain investment firm Hashed co-hosted Polygon Connect Korea to introduce Polygon and open business networking across blockchain, NFTs and Web3.
PROOF planned and ran the event with bold lighting, a casual spatial design and a hip after-party — a relaxed atmosphere where ~500 guests could network freely with influential figures and partners.

title: Polygon IGNITE
summary: Polygon's KBW-week activation — sessions, exhibition booths, business networking and an after-party for 800+ guests at Raum Art Center.

sections.p: Following Polygon Connect Korea, Polygon returned during Korea Blockchain Week with Polygon IGNITE — introducing Polygon projects through sessions and booths, and opening business networking with influential figures across industries.
PROOF built a casual, vibrantly-lit space for networking, then reset the room for an after-party with F&B stations to keep 800+ guests engaged through to the end.

title: Seoul Meta Week 2023
summary: The third edition of our flagship summit — MetaCon 2023 themed 'Web3 × Metaverse: the future of hyperconnection,' a week-long festival of conference, exhibition and side events. 1,500+ attendees.

sections.p: Seoul Meta Week is Korea's go-to platform for the latest in Web3, metaverse, NFTs and blockchain. Its third edition centered on MetaCon 2023 — 'Web3 × Metaverse: the future of hyperconnection.'

PROOF ran the main conference (20+ sessions of leader and expert insight), plus exhibitions from top domestic and global companies and a range of side events — assembled into a week-long festival for 1,500+ attendees.

title: MetaCon 2021
summary: A hybrid metaverse conference on the post-pandemic 'new normal' — speaker sourcing, program design and venue operations by PROOF. ~12,000 views.

sections.p: As the pandemic reshaped every part of life, MetaCon 2021 took the metaverse — free of the limits of time and space — as its theme, offering industry trends and the insight of pioneers for the emerging on-tact era.
PROOF delivered it end to end — from sourcing speakers at the global companies leading the metaverse, through program design, to venue operations — as a hybrid event reaching ~12,000 views.

title: Seoul Meta Week 2022
summary: The inaugural Seoul Meta Week — Blockchain Open Forum and MetaCon 2022 with ~100 experts across 40 sessions, for ~1,000 on-site attendees.

sections.p: The first Seoul Meta Week brought metaverse and blockchain experts, NFT artists and collectors together to share new trends and debate the change, insight and value the metaverse could unlock.

PROOF curated ~100 experts and designed the content for the main conferences — Blockchain Open Forum and MetaCon 2022 — running 40 sessions that mapped where future technology was heading, for ~1,000 on-site attendees.

title: HYCONHACKS
summary: A 32-hour blockchain hackathon — 40 teams building on HYCON — run by PROOF as a festival, complete with a game zone, chimaek party and performances. 200+ participants.

sections.p: An offbeat hackathon where developers, designers, publishers and student clubs competed on unique blockchain ideas — 40 teams over 32 hours building services on HYCON and general blockchain.

Across the two-day event, PROOF created spaces to rest and recharge — a game zone for refreshment — and kept energy high with a chimaek (chicken-and-beer) party and performances, running it like a festival rather than a contest.

title: Blockchain Partners Summit 2018
summary: An early-era blockchain summit (2018) organized by PROOF for Bobby Finance and Chainier — full production from planning to on-site.

sections.p: A blockchain partners summit hosted by Bobby Finance and Chainier in 2018 — one of the early-era industry gatherings, organized by Chris & Partners.
PROOF produced the summit end to end — program, speakers, venue and on-site operations — at a time when the industry's events playbook was still being written.
